title: Streaming Parser with Captures
description: Extract named values from large files without loading them into memory.

motivation.why: Combine memory efficiency of streaming with convenience of named captures for GB-scale files.
useCases: Log file analysis (extract IPs, status codes from 10GB+ logs)
CSV export processing (extract emails from 500MB+ files)
Real-time feed parsing (stock tickers, event streams)

inputFormat.description: Large files processed in fixed-size chunks.

outputFormat.description: Captures available after streaming parse completes.

requirements.description: Streaming parsing requires the native Rust extension
